code: function lib_mix($args) { if ($args[0] != "list" || count($args[2]) < 2) $this->throwError("mix expects (color1, color2, weight)"); list($first, $second) = $args[2]; $first = $this->assertColor($first); $second = $this->assertColor($second); $first_a = $this->lib_alpha($first); $second_a = $this->lib_alpha($second); if (isset($args[2][2])) { $weight = $args[2][2][1] / 100.0; } else { $weight = 0.5; } $w = $weight * 2 - 1; $a = $first_a - $second_a; $w1 = (($w * $a == -1 ? $w : ($w + $a)/(1 + $w * $a)) + 1) / 2.0; $w2 = 1.0 - $w1; $new = array('color', $w1 * $first[1] + $w2 * $second[1], $w1 * $first[2] + $w2 * $second[2], $w1 * $first[3] + $w2 * $second[3],); if ($first_a != 1.0 || $second_a != 1.0) { $new[] = $first_a * $weight + $second_a * ($weight - 1); } return $this->fixColor($new); }
